action.content: Write a funny, 150+ word ad for an attorney who helps poor people with their divorces. Highlight at least 3 text sections by italicize them with markdown (i.e. *highlighted section*).
action.label: context

action.content:
Are you currently drowning in debt, living on instant noodles, and facing a divorce that costs more than your entire life's earnings? Stop panicking and start laughing, because **Attorney "Broke" Bob** is here to save your sanity and your last five dollars! While other lawyers charge you by the hour and bill you for the air you breathe, Bob charges you in *exposure and homemade cookies*.

Why pay thousands for a fancy suit when you can get a legal genius who wears a bathrobe to court? Bob specializes in the art of the "Poor Person's Divorce," ensuring you don't end up owing more money than you ever made. He knows exactly how to navigate the legal system without draining your bank account, which is currently *empty enough to echo*.

Don't let your ex think they can bully you just because you can't afford a retainer. Bob will fight for your rights with the ferocity of a raccoon protecting a trash can lid. His fees are so low, you might actually *owe him a thank-you note instead of a check*. Call Attorney "Broke" Bob today! Remember, a happy ending doesn't require a fat wallet, just a lawyer who understands that sometimes, the only thing you have left to lose is your dignity, and Bob is here to help you keep that too.
action.label: response
